title: 10001000 Membrane Filter Press Hydraulic Pressure Automatic Membr
summary: A solid-liquid separation filter press that sends feed liquid into each filter chamber and separates solids from liquid through the filter medium under pressure. Widely used in chemical, pharmaceutical, food, metallurgy, and sewage treatment industries.
bullets: Manual, mechanical, hydraulic and automatic pressurize options
Plate frame, van and diaphragm squeezing types
Wide adaptability for viscous fine materials

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Cast iron, intensified polypropylene, glass fiber high-temperature polypropylene, stainless steel
